queries.question: Provide a count of movies for each writer
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?novelist_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:novelist ?novelist_g .
}
GROUP BY ?novelist_g

queries.question: Provide a count of movies for each writer
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?playwright_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:playwright ?playwright_g .
}
GROUP BY ?playwright_g

queries.question: Provide a count of movies for each writer
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?novelist_g ?playwright_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:novelist ?novelist_g .
  ?movies p:playwright ?playwright_g .
}
GROUP BY ?novelist_g ?playwright_g

queries.question: List the movies and their release years, sort by their novelist, then playwright.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?novelist ?playwright ?title ?release_year WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:novelist ?novelist .
  ?movies p:playwright ?playwright .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?movies p:release_year ?release_year .
  ?movies p:novelist ?novelist_o .
  ?movies p:playwright ?playwright_o .
  ?movies p:release_year ?release_year_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?novelist_o) ASC(?playwright_o) ASC(?release_year_o)

queries.question: List the movies and their release years, sort by their playwright.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?playwright ?title ?release_year WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:playwright ?playwright .
  ?movies p:title ?title .
  ?movies p:release_year ?release_year .
  ?movies p:playwright ?playwright_o .
  ?movies p:release_year ?release_year_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?playwright_o) ASC(?release_year_o)

List the movies along with their release years, sorted by writer
